entity.summary: MultiversX decentralized trading platform combining an AMM spot DEX with concentrated and single-sided liquidity features and a derivatives-platform roadmap.
entity.notes: Current first-party website identifies DX25 as a MultiversX DeFi trading platform merging AMM Spot DEX and derivatives trading. It documents the Spot DEX mainnet launch, concentrated liquidity, single-sided liquidity, multiple fee levels, and links the live application and documentation.

evidence.title: DX25 official website
evidence.notes: First-party website identifies DX25 as a MultiversX platform combining AMM Spot DEX and derivatives trading and documents concentrated liquidity, single-sided liquidity, fee levels, and its exchange development timeline.

evidence.title: DX25 official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application is linked directly from the official DX25 website as the live Spot DEX access point.

evidence.title: DX25 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies DX25 as a MultiversX decentralized exchange, corroborating the current first-party exchange surface.
